```{.r .cell-code}
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(tigris)
library(tidycensus)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(here)

raw <- read_csv(
  "C:/Users/cheny/Desktop/PPA Mid Data/opa_properties_public.csv") 

clean <- raw %>%
  mutate(
    category_code_description = str_to_upper(str_squish(category_code_description)),

    # 如果你的成交日期列不是 sale_date，请把 sale_date 换成真实列名
    sale_date = ymd_hms(as.character(sale_date), tz = "America/New_York"),
    sale_year = year(sale_date),

    mailing_city_state = str_to_upper(str_squish(mailing_city_state))
  ) %>%
  filter(
    dplyr::between(sale_year, 2023, 2024),
    category_code_description == "SINGLE FAMILY",
    mailing_city_state == "PHILADELPHIA PA"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(market_value, sale_date) %>%
  filter(market_value > 0)
```
:::
